name: White Chocolate Nut Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 package White Chocolate baking bar - 6 ounces, cut into 1/4 to 1/2 inch pieces
1 cup Nuts, coarsely chopped - almonds, pecans, walnuts, macadamias etc...
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 20 Minutes Bake Time: 8 Minutes
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a large bowl, cream the Butter Flavor Crisco and milk using an electric mixer on medium speed until well combined. Gradually add brown sugar and granulated sugar, beating in the egg and vanilla extract.
3. In another bowl, whisk together flour, baking soda, and salt. Add this dry mixture to the creamed ingredients, mixing well. Stir in the white chocolate pieces and chopped nuts. Using a level tablespoon measure, drop dough 2 inches apart onto an ungreased baking sheet.
4. Bake for 8 minutes at 375°F. Allow cooling on the baking sheet for one minute before transferring to a cooling rack.
Makes 5 dozen cookies, each about 2 inches in diameter.
